# External LightBurn compatibility fixtures

These files are unmodified public fixtures used only to verify import compatibility. They are not material recommendations and their speed or power values must not be treated as safe machine settings.

| Fixture | Source revision | License | SHA-256 | Expected result |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `clb/ddlab-laser-settings-current.clb` | [`DDlabAU/lasercutter@7a9a3f7`](https://github.com/DDlabAU/lasercutter/blob/7a9a3f74c5a5df37515c0db86c80abe5bfb12e59/laser-settings.clb) | CC0-1.0 | `1A6BB37F629A8B76659697C1592B78ED5D8185C9D1C00E0202092A227A6EC14C` | Imports entries and reports unsupported fields |
| `clb/ddlab-laser-settings-legacy.clb` | [`DDlabAU/lasercutter@e812ae6`](https://github.com/DDlabAU/lasercutter/blob/e812ae6c733494c643341fe525f3453bee2a758d/laser-settings.clb) | CC0-1.0 | `B3738B990095745B2451069FE3C022732B7072C942E209D1B6CD7D79688FB39C` | Imports an older real library revision |
| `clb/h3mul-main-material-library.clb` | [`H3mul/laser-cutting@bc9b54a`](https://github.com/H3mul/laser-cutting/blob/bc9b54ad57c34698fa08beb014b8e42a0e9d745f/main%20material%20library.clb) | MIT | `1CE827A0F18574FC0F506DD0DE7FE50FAD9B4EFA918B90B509F27C048D7173A8` | Imports entries and reports unsupported fields |
| `clb/jayson-big-blue-laser.clb` | [`Jayson-Q/Makerspace-Projects@ad7f9d3`](https://github.com/Jayson-Q/Makerspace-Projects/blob/ad7f9d36d6c9677a8a36c737123a111e9709b3be/Device%20Configs/Lightburn/Big%20Blue%20Laser.clb) | MIT | `EFB0FC40E90157BD56D07A849942B0CE7BCF830F5D8A7E038858B3469E6B6300` | Imports entries and reports unsupported fields |
| `clb/jayson-tmx90-empty.clb` | [`Jayson-Q/Makerspace-Projects@ad7f9d3`](https://github.com/Jayson-Q/Makerspace-Projects/blob/ad7f9d36d6c9677a8a36c737123a111e9709b3be/Device%20Configs/Lightburn/TMX90%20Materials.clb) | MIT | `23D4201CD188FEC6FFC49C5D2AF37D846C7DC2CFB261BFAF91BDD745F4A9803D` | Rejected explicitly as an empty library |
| `lbrn/acwright-plate.lbrn2` | [`acwright/6502-COB@7486bd6`](https://github.com/acwright/6502-COB/blob/7486bd68e8c67967bf50f4be321b43c68ed49a0d/CAD/Bases/Plate.lbrn2) | CERN-OHL-P-2.0 | `B9AB0A0A86545A93FAD77061B5533BED98982D9E03185D56ECFC84B34A6D8ACA` | Imports 25 objects with no warnings |
| `lbrn/acwright-db25-helper-top.lbrn2` | [`acwright/6502-COB@7486bd6`](https://github.com/acwright/6502-COB/blob/7486bd68e8c67967bf50f4be321b43c68ed49a0d/CAD/Tops/DB25%20Helper%20Top.lbrn2) | CERN-OHL-P-2.0 | `6CD586CAE7370B84249C44F44042E7FA0DC5A44E2E4358CACEDC6F1A82CAE751` | Imports 5 objects with no warnings |

| `lbrn/acwright-joystick-helper-top.lbrn2` | [`acwright/6502-COB@7486bd6`](https://github.com/acwright/6502-COB/blob/7486bd68e8c67967bf50f4be321b43c68ed49a0d/CAD/Tops/Joystick%20Helper%20Top.lbrn2) | CERN-OHL-P-2.0 | `22ED1CEF36A4E46E11DA8AFAAEB37AB7CDEDD37859BEEC739EA795EFCC60D758` | Imports 5 objects with no warnings |

The corresponding license texts are retained in `licenses/`. Repository-level licenses were verified from the pinned repositories before the files were added. CERN-OHL-P-2.0 is the permissive variant of the CERN Open Hardware Licence and applies only to the five `acwright` fixture files. No GPL, LGPL, non-commercial, or unlicensed fixture is included.
